research_interests: Fiber and integrated optics, photonics, and optical fiber sensors and devices.
Designing, fabricating, and optimizing optical setups, with a specific emphasis on optical fiber devices.
Multiferroic materials for the development of all-fiber electric and magnetic field sensors.

Design, experimental demonstration and modeling fiber ring resonator device with fiber cantilever-deflection probe for sensing surrounding electric field
